case_title: SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI VS. DAVIN LYLE COLE

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, DAVIN LYLE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-29-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLE, DAVIN LYLE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, PLAINTIFF PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT WAS LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL BILLS, PROPERTY DAMAGE, AND INCOME LOSS EXCEED THE COURT'S JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, DAVIN LYLE
